t.t-if: mailing.state == 'done' and mailing.sent == 0 and mailing.failed == 0 and mailing.canceled == 0
t.span: There wasn't enough recipients left for this mailing

t.p: This is the winner of the A/B testing campaign and has been sent to all remaining recipients.
The winner has already been sent. Use Compare Version to get an overview of this A/B testing campaign.

A sample of % of recipients will receive this version.
The sum of all percentages for this A/B campaign totals % of all potential recipients.
Some of the mailings will not be sent, as only 1 email will be sent for each unique recipient in this campaign.

Don't forget to send your preferred version Since the date and time for this test has not been scheduled, don't forget to manually send your preferred version.
Then on the having the will be sent to the remaining recipients.
A sample of % of recipients will receive this version.
Try different variations in the campaign to compare their .
Once the best version is identified, we will send the best one to the remaining recipients.
Use alternative versions to be able to select the winner.
